sys_script_include.description:
2.8 | 2022-09-21 | raj |STRY0130087 - 2.8 Certifier requested updates - 5. Dot walking to sys_id : It is not necessary to include the sys_id of a reference field when dot-walking, as in the following example: 2.8 | 2022-02-22 | raj | STRY0118875- Need to rewrite/rework workflow
This script include takes a Task and saves it as a Template
sys_script_include.name: Tasker_SaveTaskAsTemplate
